rationale: The cited 2006 JMR study is a clear topical antecedent on banner/display advertising effects on actual purchasing, which closely matches the citing paper’s focus on causal effects of retargeted display ads on behavior. The citing note says the 2019 paper extends prior online advertising/retargeting literature and addresses limited causal evidence, so this citation is plausibly foundational rather than an obvious incidental mention, even though the match evidence is only DOI-level.
